message:
fix(client): apply BSD/Unix-family widening to default_config_paths

Companion fix to 975f6bc2 (which generalized
claude_desktop_config_path to all non-macOS unix targets).
default_config_paths had the same Linux-only XDG fallback that
silently dropped the user-level config.json entries on
FreeBSD/NetBSD/OpenBSD/DragonFly/Illumos, leaving callers to fall
back to the project-relative paths only.

Switch to cfg(all(unix, not(target_os = "macos"))) so both
config-discovery surfaces have parity. macOS and Windows arms
unchanged.

No new test surface — existing test_claude_desktop_config_path_is_some
already exercises the parallel fn; default_config_paths is platform-
gated and would need conditional fixtures, which is outside the scope
of this small portability fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
